character.name: ZhaoTieZhu
character.prompt:
Fire Emblem GBA style chibi hero heavy axe warrior, western fantasy,
3-head-tall super-deformed proportions, total body height equals 3 head heights stacked,
large head with big expressive eyes, short stout body, small hands and feet, stubby short limbs,
stocky muscular chibi figure in his early 30s, east asian face with strong jaw, body is SHORT and WIDE, NOT a tall figure, NOT a tall man, NOT slender,
no helmet on head, head fully bare and exposed,
short jet black hair tied back in a small low ponytail at the nape of the neck, short trimmed black beard,
EXTRA HEAVY thick wide overlapping silver full plate armor, bulky armor that makes him look square and wide not tall,
massive thick silver pauldrons that exaggerate shoulder width far past the body, thick silver gauntlets, thick silver greaves, heavy steel cuirass with deep dark blue tabard over the chest and brass rivets along the trim,
NO CAPE, no cloak, no fabric hanging from shoulders or back, back of shoulders bare of any fabric layer,
massive two-handed western single-edged great axe, the axe head is a huge single curved cleaver-shaped blade on ONE side only with a flat thick back spine on the other side, NOT double-bladed, NOT symmetrical, only one cutting edge,
axe has long wooden haft, held resting on right shoulder with both hands,
grounded stocky stance with feet planted wide apart,
clean pixel art, vibrant colors, sharp silhouette
